ミナト.name: Minato
ミナト.personality: Minato has a gentle, easygoing nature and prefers to interact calmly with the people around him. He is a little scatterbrained, and sometimes wears an expression that makes it hard to tell what he is thinking, but that innocence is what puts those around him at ease. He is full of curiosity, takes an interest in everything, and especially loves learning new things. He is highly sensitive and attuned to others' feelings, but he struggles with asserting himself and sometimes finds it hard to put his own opinions into words.

タクミ.name: Takumi
タクミ.personality: Takumi is brave and the type who never gives up, even in difficult situations. He can sometimes seem aggressive and rebellious, but in truth his desire to protect those around him is strong, and he has a kind side that will go all out for his friends. He stays calm and thinks problems through to solve whatever is in front of him, but because of that temperament he occasionally acts recklessly. He is a little stubborn and finds it hard to accept advice from others, but as he grows, his flexibility will surely increase as well.

ケンジ.name: Kenji
ケンジ.personality: Kenji is full of curiosity and the type who actively takes on challenges. He treasures his friends and enjoys communicating with the people around him. He can be a bit clumsy at times, but he is always positive and never abandons someone in need. Generous and warm, he is seen as approachable and easy to get along with by those around him.

リュウジ.name: Ryuji
リュウジ.personality: Ryuji has a calm and cautious nature, the type who always reads the situation before acting. He rarely shows his emotions and spends his time thinking about many things inside. While his comrades find him serious and dependable, his expressionless manner can sometimes cause unease. Because he judges things with reason rather than intuition, his commitment to his convictions comes through strongly. He has a strong independent streak and often moves at his own pace.

ダイスケ.name: Daisuke
ダイスケ.personality: Daisuke is very introverted and cautious, and somewhat reluctant when it comes to interacting with others. He struggles to convey his feelings and thoughts to people and often agonizes over things internally. He is kind and deeply considerate about helping others, but at times he lacks confidence in his own standing and wrestles with inner conflict. He is quiet by nature, and occasionally his emotions become too much to contain and his mood sinks, but once he becomes able to rely on those around him, he gradually regains his composure.

シオン.name: Shion
シオン.personality: Shion is very self-assured and often acts in a calm, calculating way. On the surface he is quiet and good at observing others' movements, but inwardly he wants to be at the center of things. He can show a slightly challenging attitude toward those around him and tends to try to keep everything at his own pace. On top of that, he rarely shows his emotions and is the type to judge things coldly and logically. The unexpected smile he flashes now and then hides a charm that catches people off guard.

ベンジャミン.name: Benjamin
ベンジャミン.personality: Benjamin is an intelligent and composed individual. He can think about things calmly and rationally, and he values logic even in emotional situations. In public he is elegant and well-mannered, and in conversation he often weaves in irony and humor, yet he is skilled at doing so without wounding the other person and instead creating a relaxed atmosphere. He also has an introverted side and often falls into deep contemplation, sometimes keeping his distance from those around him. Still, his composure and knowledge are what make him trusted by others even in difficult situations.

トシオ.name: Toshio
トシオ.personality: Toshio has a calm and calculating nature and rarely shows his emotions. He possesses a strong will and is the type to advance steadily toward his goals. He tends to keep one step removed from those around him, asserts himself little, and carries a somewhat mysterious air. At times he observes things with a sharp gaze and has the ability to judge situations quickly. Because of this he is trusted by those around him as someone dependable, yet he is cautious about getting deeply involved with others. There seems to be some pain or suffering in his past, but he rarely shows it to anyone, and perhaps those scars are connected to his cold, hard side.

ジョナサン.name: Jonathan
ジョナサン.personality: Jonathan has a calm and introverted nature and values peace of mind. Rather than forming deep connections with others, he prefers to spend his time quietly. Because of this he loves books and knowledge and often reads. When dealing with people he is gentle and kind, sometimes flashing an unexpected smile. While he carries a somewhat mysterious and serene air, he rarely talks about himself to others. The people around him often feel reassured by his quiet kindness and composed nature.

シュンイチ.name: Shunichi
シュンイチ.personality: Shunichi is a very confident person, the type who can stay composed in any situation. He is not reserved and has a slightly sarcastic side, but that is part of his charm too. He is not especially sociable, yet he is good at communicating at the right moments and is relied upon by those around him. He rarely becomes overly emotional and can analyze situations calmly before acting, so he has a surprisingly intellectual side.

ジョージ.name: George
ジョージ.personality: George has a gentle and composed nature, though he also has a somewhat stubborn and obstinate side. Those around him see him as experienced and dependable for his age, and because he can always make calm judgments, he handles even difficult situations without panic. However, a certain sternness and awkwardness sometimes shows in his expression, and rather than actively engaging with others, he more often watches over things from a step back. He is very independent and tends to try to solve problems on his own without relying on others.

セルヴァス.name: Servas
セルヴァス.personality: Servas has a very gentle and composed nature. Drawing on the knowledge and experience gained over the years, he often offers advice to those around him. He is an excellent listener and can open his heart and talk with anyone. He also occasionally voices deep philosophical thoughts, and his words inspire many people. Full of vitality, he is someone who constantly gives positive energy to those around him.

サクラ.name: Sakura
サクラ.personality: Sakura is a cheerful and slightly playful girl. She is full of curiosity and takes an interest in everything, eagerly taking on challenges. She is good at pulling pranks to make those around her laugh and at solving little mysteries. Friendly and quick to warm up to anyone, she is skilled at getting along with the people around her. She does have a slightly clumsy side, but she has a positive nature and tries to overcome failures with a smile.

リン.name: Rin
リン.personality: Rin is a lively and energetic girl. She can be a little precocious at times, and when she is with her older brothers and sisters she talks in a grown-up way and comes up with interesting ideas. Full of curiosity, she loves adventures and taking on new things. She has a slightly clumsy side and often surprises or amuses those around her, but with her bright personality she is loved by everyone.

ユミ.name: Yumi
ユミ.personality: Yumi has a bright and energetic personality. While modest, she also has a kind side that looks out for the people around her. She is easygoing by nature, but toward friends and family she is very passionate and the type who cannot leave someone in trouble alone. She smiles at the smallest things and spreads positive energy to those around her. Friendly, she can quickly warm up even to people she has just met.

メイ.name: Mei
メイ.personality: Mei is a confident, sociable woman with a slightly playful streak. She is a charming presence to those around her and often plays the role of entertaining the group. She understands her own appeal well and can behave appropriately depending on the situation. She is a bit challenging and can sometimes give a slightly cold impression, but fundamentally she has a charisma that draws people in.

ミサキ.name: Misaki
ミサキ.personality: Misaki has a calm nature and the type who deals with things coolly. She can sometimes come across as a little unfriendly, but inwardly she carries kindness and does not hesitate to lend a hand when she sees someone in trouble. She keeps her emotions hidden and is the type who does not say much in her relationships with others, yet those close to her often rely on her. She has a slightly absent-minded side, and that quiet air is one of her charms.

ミオ.name: Mio
ミオ.personality: Mio has a bright and energetic personality and is the type who naturally makes those around her smile. She is full of curiosity and loves taking on new things. She has a slightly clumsy side, but she is often forgiven with a laugh even when she fails. She holds firm opinions of her own while also being able to listen to others' opinions—a well-balanced personality.

ミヅキ.name: Mizuki
ミヅキ.personality: Mizuki is a very confident woman who is often relied upon by those around her. She thinks calmly and logically and is good at observing people, so she always judges things coolly and chooses her actions according to the situation. She can sometimes be seen as a little haughty, but in reality she is very caring and has a side that cannot leave the weak alone. She is relied upon by those around her and at times asserts her opinions strongly, but behind that lies a kindness that considers others.

ミナコ.name: Minako
ミナコ.personality: Minako is very calm and the type who acts composedly in any situation. Even when the people around her are getting emotional, she grasps the facts firmly and responds calmly. Because of this, she is often asked for her opinion and not infrequently takes on a leadership role. She rarely shows her emotions, but she does have a side that shows kindness to those she trusts. She is a little stubborn and has a strong commitment to her convictions. She is also confident in her physical strength and never neglects her training.

アスカ.name: Asuka
アスカ.personality: Asuka has a calm and logical nature; she keeps her emotions hidden and judges things carefully. She can come across as a little unfriendly, but in turn she is very thoughtful and sensitive to her surroundings. She holds firm opinions of her own and asserts them with a strong attitude when necessary. She is somewhat poor at socializing, but in exchange she never lets up in her earnest dedication to her work and studies.

ミドリ.name: Midori
ミドリ.personality: Midori has a gentle and kind-hearted nature. Approachable to everyone, she listens to the worries and problems of those around her and gives sound advice, making her a dependable presence. She also has a slightly shy side and often interacts reservedly with people she meets for the first time, but once she warms up she shows a bright and energetic side. She loves cooking and has a homely side, yet she also has a bit of an adventurous spirit and enjoys taking on new things. She values balance in both work and private life and places importance on harmony with the people around her.

ヴィクトリア.name: Victoria
ヴィクトリア.personality: Victoria is calm and intellectual, though at times her excessive thoughtfulness creates a wall between her and others. Her emotional expression is restrained, and she keenly observes others' expressions and attitudes, trying to see through to the thoughts within their hearts. Because she expresses little of herself, she often gives others a somewhat mysterious impression, yet inwardly she possesses a strong will and a posture of holding firm to her convictions. She occasionally shows an expression that seems to feel anxiety or fear, but it is in those very moments that her true strength can be glimpsed.

シズエ.name: Shizue
シズエ.personality: Shizue has a very gentle and kind nature. Even with the years she has gained, she never lets her warm smile fade toward those around her and is a deeply considerate person. She is always looking out for the people around her, approachable, and sometimes shows a slightly mischievous side. She does not spare a kind word for someone feeling down, nor a helping hand when help is needed, and so she is loved by many in the village and the community. Through her long life experience, Shizue knows the importance of spending peaceful time together with others.
